title: Repair persistent Chronik WGX smoke baseline
goal: Restore a deterministic green WGX smoke on Chronik main by fixing the tracked profile parser or profile contract without weakening unsafe-assignment rejection or hiding unrelated failures.

acceptance.assertion: The exact main-branch WGX smoke failure is reproduced and its parser/profile root cause is identified from logs and tracked inputs.
The repair accepts only the intended profile form and preserves rejection of command substitution, expansion, shell execution and unsafe assignments.
Tests cover the formerly rejected valid line plus representative unsafe profile inputs.
The WGX smoke passes on the exact PR head and subsequent main push without suppressing the workflow or marking failure as allowed.

metadata.observation: The push-only WGX smoke rejects a tracked profile assignment as unsafe; equivalent failures were observed on main before PR #215 and persisted after its byte-identical merge tree.
does_not_establish: that the profile line is safe before parser-level review
